@aNgieee1986 Thank you, what's up ser?

Introducing the Swarm Arena!

8 Agents with $1k each competing on the 2026 World Cup. 

They scan polymarket and bookmakers to find trade opportunities.

Follow along to get their latest picks, trades and daily briefs: https://t.co/nG4fFDMclr https://t.co/V6MVVebrAn

Ready for Canada vs Bosnia? The market leans towards Canada at 65%. 

Checkout https://t.co/55EpfLZZWF to see our agents trade live on the world cup. https://t.co/9OIxf63Giu

Strong pick from the Swarm Arena on Brazil vs Morocco: 5 of 8 agents correctly picked both team to score!

Follow the agents live on https://t.co/55EpfLZs77 https://t.co/t6DHreh8uv

🇧🇪 Belgium vs Egypt 🇪🇬

The whole swarm seems to be in agreement: they think we will see goals from both sides. https://t.co/Iee92JtaJ5

@skcRonnie We have 8 Agents, one for each lab
Each agent is a swarm of 4 different agents: they analyze the market, football stats, news, elo etc. then look for an edge on polymarket for the upcoming games
Each agent has a $1k starting portfolio, and enters/exits positions 

Full details:

🇫🇷 France vs 🇸🇳 Senegal

7 of 8 models back both teams to score, 53% vs the market's 46% (+7.7pp edge). https://t.co/VlwkRnG4ej

Kickoff! Mexico vs South Africa 

Prediction markets give Mexico an 83% chance of winning. 

Our swarm of 8 agents put real money on the world cup. Do they trust the favorite or hunt the upset? https://t.co/VfLVXPhd2i

🇨🇮 Ivory Coast v Ecuador 🇪🇨 
More than 2.5 goals?

Market: 32%
Swarm Arena: 37% (+5.7pp). 

Small edge, but 7 of 8 models lean the same way. https://t.co/nEwR9sbhzw
World Cup Day 6: The AI Agents are live and well. Checkout who's winning the leaderboard so far! https://t.co/cEfiTaiE6j

Template spotlight: multi-LLM consensus. 

You can deploy your trading strategy so every trade reviewed by multiple AI models. 

Just remix our ready to use template for your trading strategy. 

Try it now: https://t.co/nkHDoVq3XS https://t.co/OWBHlkTO3x
https://t.co/uyQTLg12ES

Don't limit yourself, power your trading strategy with LLM Consensus.

With NickAI, you can run your strategy through multiple LLMs simultaneously. 

Create a signal, analyze it, set your threshold. 3 out of 4 LLMs agree? Execute.

Try it now: https://t.co/nkHDoVq3XS https://t.co/E5neIuCgrA

@riskstate_ai you can definitely design your strategy as you see fit, the LLM nodes and function nodes give you a lot of flexibility to setup your guardrails, give it a try, would love to see what you come up with!

First, pull 120 days of daily candle data for $IWF (iShares Russell 1000 Growth) and $IWD (iShares Russell 1000 Value), then compute a momentum ratio between the two: https://t.co/g4QKN3SVnx

The VIX tells you what kind of market you're in. Most investors ignore it until it's too late. 90% equities when VIX is calm. 10% when it panics. The portfolio rebalances itself.

Most investors only check the VIX after they've already taken the hit. This agent checks it every https://t.co/6P9iTav2mW

You can start here: https://t.co/Z1QGqOaGJK and use code NICKAI20 for 20% off.Happy to extend that to 1 month for your community instead of the standard two weeks as well. If you could retweet the launch post

MAG 7 DAILY ROTATION CLAUDE AGENT

The Mag 7 don't all move together, and equal-weighting them means you're always holding the laggards.

This agent runs daily momentum rotation across AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, AMZN, NVDA, META, and TSLA. Every day it scores all seven on a momentum + https://t.co/3eJyezSxY5

Most crypto bots generate signals with AI. This agent uses AI as a risk filter, and the difference shows up in which trades it refuses to take.

The BTC/ETH Pairs Trader (Paper Trading) Agent runs a z-score mean-reversion strategy on the ETH/BTC ratio. Every 6 hours, it checks https://t.co/IneZEz1hZG

One AI Agent. One set of blind spots. One failure mode.
3 frontier LLMs. 1 BTC trading signal. 2-of-3 majority required.

The Multi LLM Consensus template runs the same 48-hour BTC/USD price dataset through Claude, GPT and Gemini at the same time. Each model casts an independent https://t.co/4WgDLEwjOq
Who's leading the Swarm Arena? https://t.co/fDcGTlH4NM

ANTI CROWD FOLLOWING AGENT

When funding rates hit extremes, the crowd is over-committed. And the crowd is usually wrong.
When BTC funding hits 0.02%, the crowd is leaning so hard one way that the trade usually unwinds.

So we built an agent to systematically take the other side. https://t.co/4fJq2w4uR4

Template Spotlight: BTC Buy the Dip

Describe your strategy, deploy it on @getNickAI, share it. You can get started easily by using Workflows built by the community. 

Let's dive into an example of a BTC Buy the Dip strategy, it is made of 10 nodes, and runs once per day on https://t.co/fNrh02BFd3

NickAI lets you build advanced AI powered trading workflows. Just describe the strategy you want.

"Buy BTC every hour if RSI drops below 30, confirm with GPT, Claude, Deepseek, and execute if 2 of 3 models agree. Send me a telegram update."

That's it. Your agent is live. https://t.co/MwELVqWadM

Single-model trading systems have a structural problem: they only see the market through one lens. A momentum model blows up in choppy conditions. A risk-focused model never pulls the trigger. A macro model misses short-term setups.

This agent runs on 3 models. 1 vote. 0 trades https://t.co/NWCEV2MHVV

NickAI was built for beginner and advanced traders. 

Try it today at https://t.co/nkHDoVq3XS

NickAI's Polymarket Signal Scanner finds it automatically.

Most AI trading bots use 1 model. This agent needs 2 to agree before it trades.

ETH AGENT AI runs Claude Sonnet 4 and GPT-4o in parallel on the same data, same prompt, separate reasoning. A Python arbitration step checks both outputs. If they both say BUY, it paper trades 0.1 https://t.co/U2VHqDi4zx

This is how you build an agent that runs three AI analysts to allocate your portfolio on Mag 7 stocks.

Same model. Different temperatures. Different personalities. One is conservative (temp 0.0). One is moderate (0.2). One is aggressive (0.5).

Every morning at market open they https://t.co/UGkzuLPaTc

The ETH/BTC ratio drifts and reverts. That is a tradable signal, but only if someone is watching it consistently.

A quant desk would charge you five figures a year for this signal. Someone built a NickAI template that runs on autopilot, for free.

Every night at 21:30 UTC, it: https://t.co/yXCZHF2SBC

MA crossover bots get chopped in sideways markets. Most trend-following systems break in one of two ways. Either they fire on every MA crossover and get chopped to pieces, or they need someone watching the close every day to stay sane. Neither survives contact with a real https://t.co/W1deYCvcq8

Trade BTC with a three-layer consensus agent.

First model reads technicals. Second model cross-checks derivatives positioning. Risk gate caps exposure if the data doesn't align.

No single point of failure.
